# Test Sagar

> Test Sagar is a free online exam-preparation platform for nursing and competitive exams. It offers full-length mock tests, the TNC Nursing Test Series, instant server-scored results, detailed solutions, subject-wise analytics, and all-India leaderboards.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://quiz-revue-dash.lovable.app/): Dashboard with available tests and quick start.
- [TNC Nursing Test Series](https://quiz-revue-dash.lovable.app/tnc-tests): Searchable, category-filtered nursing mock tests (NORCET, AIIMS, SGPGI, BTSC, CHO, and more) with timed quizzes, instant scoring, and PDF result export.
- [Pricing](https://quiz-revue-dash.lovable.app/pricing): Premium subscription plans (1 week to 2 years) with promo-code support.
- [Leaderboard](https://quiz-revue-dash.lovable.app/leaderboard): All-India rankings by average score and accuracy.
- [Analytics](https://quiz-revue-dash.lovable.app/analytics): Personal performance analytics across attempts.
- [Contact](https://quiz-revue-dash.lovable.app/contact): Support via WhatsApp.

## Notes
- Taking quizzes requires a free account. Quiz answers are graded server-side; answer keys are never exposed before submission.
- Support is provided over WhatsApp.
